# ctxfile

> ctxfile is a local-first, open-source MCP server that snapshots a project's working state (plan, key files, git state, session digests) into one structured context object any AI agent can load. Threads give work a durable identity across providers; an encrypted Sync vault carries the same context to web chatbots (Grok, ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity) via MCP connectors. Free core is Apache-2.0 on npm as `ctxfile`; Pro adds session connectors for 8 coding agents, encrypted memory, multi-provider consult (Anthropic, OpenRouter, OpenAI-compatible, local Ollama), AI-distilled prompt playbooks, and voice. Nothing leaves the machine by default; everything ingested is secret-redacted at write.

Key facts: install with `npm install -g ctxfile`; works with any MCP client (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Aider, OpenClaw, Hermes); listed on the MCP Registry as `dev.ctxfile/ctxfile`; the exported artifact follows the versioned `.ctxfile/context.json` convention any tool can read; the Sync relay is open source and self-hostable.

## Docs

- [Quickstart](https://ctxfile.dev/docs): install, connect a client, first snapshot
- [Client setup](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/clients): per-client tabs for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, OpenClaw, Hermes, Claude Desktop, aider, plus generic MCP config
- [Web chatbots](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/webchat): connect Grok, ChatGPT, Claude web, Perplexity via MCP connectors; export and paste for Gemini and any prompt box
- [Local models](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/local-models): Ollama setup, local summaries and consult, a fully local agent with OpenCode, which models support tool calling
- [Playbooks](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/playbooks): reusable prompts an AI distills from your own sessions (Pro)
- [Threads and handoff](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/threads): durable cross-provider work identity, handoff packages, grants
- [Sync and roaming](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/sync): the encrypted vault, standard vs strict mode, self-hosting the relay
- [The .ctxfile convention](https://ctxfile.dev/convention): the versioned context artifact for tool authors
- [Privacy](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/privacy): zero network by default, secret redaction, denied paths
- [Security overview](https://ctxfile.dev/security): the CISO one-pager
- [Make it automatic](https://ctxfile.dev/docs/automatic): the Behavior Layer, an installable skill (`ctxfile init`) that teaches an agent when to checkpoint; renders to a portable SKILL.md for Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenClaw, and Hermes, a Cursor rule, and GEMINI.md / AGENTS.md blocks
- [Pricing](https://ctxfile.dev/pricing): Free (Apache-2.0), Pro $12/mo, Sync $6/mo, Team

## Supported clients (MCP server, `npm install -g ctxfile`)

Each entry is the exact registration; run ctxfile from the project or pass an absolute `--root`.

- Claude Code: `claude mcp add ctxfile -- ctxfile --root .` (verify: `claude mcp list`)
- Cursor: `.cursor/mcp.json` -> `{"mcpServers":{"ctxfile":{"command":"ctxfile","args":["--root","."]}}}`
- Codex CLI: `codex mcp add ctxfile -- ctxfile --root .` (writes `~/.codex/config.toml` `[mcp_servers.ctxfile]`)
- OpenCode: `opencode.json` -> `{"mcp":{"ctxfile":{"type":"local","command":["ctxfile","--root","."],"enabled":true}}}`
- Gemini CLI: `gemini mcp add ctxfile ctxfile --root .` or `~/.gemini/settings.json` `mcpServers`
- OpenClaw: `openclaw mcp add ctxfile --command ctxfile --arg --root --arg /abs/path` (config key is `mcp.servers`)
- Hermes: `~/.hermes/config.yaml` `mcp_servers.ctxfile` command/args; tools register as `mcp_ctxfile_<tool>`
- Claude Desktop: install the `ctxfile.mcpb` extension, or `claude_desktop_config.json` `mcpServers`
- Aider: no MCP client; use `ctxfile export` then `/read .ctxfile/context.json`
- Any other MCP client: `{"command":"ctxfile","args":["--root","."]}` over stdio

## Web chatbots (remote MCP connector to the self-hosted Sync relay)

The relay needs a public HTTPS URL; chatbots connect from their own cloud, not your machine.

- Claude.ai: Settings -> Connectors -> Add custom connector; use the tokened URL `https://your-relay/mcp/t/<token>`
- ChatGPT: developer mode connectors for all tools (Pro/Team/Enterprise), or the `search`+`fetch` data path
- Grok: Connectors -> Custom (Business/Enterprise per x.ai docs; some consumer plans have it)
- Perplexity: custom remote connector (Pro/Max/Enterprise)
- Gemini web, and any prompt box: `ctxfile export --stdout` and paste the envelope

## MCP tools exposed

- Free core: `get_context`, `save_session`, `continue_thread`, `list_threads`, `ingest_context`
- Pro adds: `remember`, `recall`, `forget`, `consult`, `distill_playbook`, `list_playbooks`, `get_playbook`, `rm_playbook`, `transcribe_voice`

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/ctxfile/ctxfile): the open-source core, relay, and dashboard
- [npm: ctxfile](https://www.npmjs.com/package/ctxfile)
- [npm: @ctxfile/relay](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ctxfile/relay)
